name: Twin Maiden Husks
description: The Twin Maiden Husks are two corpses of maidens located in the Roundtable Hold. These two Maiden Husks act as merchants of some kind to the all that come to the Roundtable Hold. They look dead, their skin hard and dry as a corpse, but they do carry some life, only they can’t speak. Not much else is known of these two besides their role as Merchants
creator: TheOneWhoTypes
